title: Doomsday
writer: Doris Anderson, Warwick Deeping, Julian Johnson
actors: Florence Vidor, Gary Cooper, Lawrence Grant
plot: In the English countryside, young Mary Viner has an opportunity to marry Arnold Furze, the hard-working but lonely owner of the oddly-named Doomsday Farm. He sacrifices a treasured stand of old trees to afford to bring the farm up...
